name: MX Linux
description: MX Linux is a collaboration between the antiX and MX communities, built on Debian Stable. Its defining feature is MX Tools — a curated set of graphical utilities for system management, backups, and package handling that makes Debian approachable without hiding its power. The Xfce desktop keeps resource usage low, making it a strong choice for older hardware that still needs a capable, fully-featured environment.
